description: Final curated-focused set of Internet Archive audio collections for the Lorewave/Parso Radio listener app.
caveats: Tiers are ranked: curated_focused > genre_curators > lp_curators > fav_lists. Default a clean view to the first two; let users opt into the rest.
lp_curators are single individuals' donated LP collections — one curator, but genre-mixed (varies by collector).
fav_lists may reference items that are removed or go dark; verify availability at ingest.
Most curated IA audio is pre-1972 due to copyright; modern studio jazz/pop remains sparse.

tiers.curated_focused: Hand-selected single-curator or single-genre collections (highest quality).
tiers.genre_curators: Individuals who scope their uploads to one genre (Satyr-style).
tiers.lp_curators: Individuals' donated personal LP collections — one curator, genre-mixed.
tiers.fav_lists: IA user favorites lists, genre-themed; quality/availability varies — verify at ingest.
